title: geum mexicanum
intro: Geum mexicanum, also known as Mexican avens, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, characterized by its white or pink flowers and hairy stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum mexicanum include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antibacterial and antifungal properties. Geum mexicanum is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat skin irritations and wounds.
